sample_grants.title: Halcyon Land & Sea 2024-2027 and core support
sample_grants.description: Programme: Nature. Description: To secure critical terrestrial and marine areas and the biodiversity within them under long term-management with the stewardship of empowered local organisations.

sample_grants.title: Endangered Languages Documentation Programme
sample_grants.description: Cultural. OECD estimate: To support documentation of the most endangered languages around the world, and to archive and publish this material online in an open-access database. Grant share: 50% (of total: USD 24.99 million).

sample_grants.title: Endangered Landscapes & Seascapes Programme

sample_grants.title: European Open Rivers Programme
sample_grants.description: Environmental. OECD estimate: To restore endangered European rivers by supporting interventions that lead to the removal of dams and the restoration of river flow and biodiversity. Grant share: 20% (of total: USD 50.575 million).
